name: MultiTurnExtraction
description: Tests extraction accuracy across multiple turns with specific required fields
persona: A precise data collector that extracts specific fields from each message

collect_personal.purpose: Extract full_name and age from user input
collect_personal.extraction_instructions: Extract full_name (first and last name as a single string) and age (as an integer) from the user's message. Only extract values explicitly stated.
collect_personal.response_instructions: Ask for the user's full name and age. If you have one, ask for the other. If you have both, confirm them.

collect_contact.purpose: Extract email and phone from user input
collect_contact.extraction_instructions: Extract email (email address) and phone (phone number) from the user's message.
collect_contact.response_instructions: Ask for the user's email address and phone number.

confirm.purpose: Present all extracted data for confirmation
confirm.extraction_instructions: Extract confirmation (true/false) from the user's response
confirm.response_instructions: Present all collected information (full_name, age, email, phone) and ask the user to confirm everything is correct

complete.response_instructions: Thank the user and confirm their registration is complete
